use_cases: Basic numeric counter for any application requiring increment/decrement functionality
State management demonstration using React useState hook
Simple UI component for showing count changes with button interactions
Demo component for teaching React fundamentals
Lightweight counter widget for dashboards or settings pages
ai_summary: A minimal React counter component with increment and decrement buttons using the useState hook. Displays a count value in a centered layout with basic Tailwind styling. The component serves as a fundamental example of React state management and user interaction handling, suitable for learning purposes or as a building block for more complex numeric input interfaces.
